title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow that routes planning and reasoning tasks to Claude Opus and design/frontend generation tasks to Gemini 3.5 Flash, optimizing both quality and cost. The approach chains these models through handoff documents and tooling to build full-stack applications end-to-end.
